params.SelectPrompt: Choose a card other than a basic land card to ban
params.SpellDescription: Ban a card other than a basic land card for the rest of the match. (All cards with that name in any zone or sideboard are removed from the match.)

remaining_params.SelectPrompt: Choose a card other than a basic land card to ban
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Ban a card other than a basic land card for the rest of the match. (All cards with that name in any zone or sideboard are removed from the match.)
